description: An accepted implemented requirement loses its accepted decision graph backing.
expected_error: Implemented requirement markdown-format:REQ-0003 has no accepted decision graph backing

mutations.replace:
- subject:
    id: markdown-format:DEC-0007
    type: Decision
  predicate: DECIDES
  object:
    id: markdown-format:REQ-0003
    type: Requirement
mutations.with:
- subject:
    id: markdown-format:DEC-0007
    type: Decision
  predicate: DECIDES
  object:
    id: markdown-format:REQ-9999
    type: Requirement
